conditions.rightValue: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON

parameters.completionMessage:
The profile picture could not be updated.

Common causes:
- Image too large (max 5 MB)
- Wrong format (use JPEG, 640×640 px)
- Transparent background (use solid color)
- Token expired or API rate limit

Please adjust your image and try again. If the problem persists, check the Meta platform status.
